title: Nicolababe Weapon Pack 225 PCS Accessories Military Weapon Set Incl Helmet Body Armor Cloak and Motorcycles Designed for Minifigures Compatible with Minifigures of Major Brands (SWAT Weapon)
features: Package includes 225 PCS different weapons/equipments, building instruction and packing list(All pieces shown in picture are included, minifigures are not included).
Designed for police/SWAT/military minifgiures. All weapons are 100% brand new with perfect detail and made of high quality ABS, you can play with confidence.
Guaranteed compatible with all major brands.

Some of weapons need to be assembled by yourself such as rocket launcher, mortar and Gatling gun, etc. It's easy to build and it will improve children's hand-eye coordination and problem solving skills.
Come with many colored weapons with great details. Guaranteed you will love them. Package includes small parts, recommend to ages 5 and up.
description: Product Description This weapons pack are designed for police & SWAT or military minifigures, 100% compatible with minifigures of all major brands. Details Package Includes: Packing list and building instrucion(Assembly Required). 1ST pack include weapons parts and equipments. 2ND pack include 2 PCS weapon crates + 2 PCS motorcycles. 3RD pack include ninja weapons. 4TH and 5TH pack include weapons pieces. Feature: Assemble the kinds of guns and equipments to improve children's hand-eye coordination and problem solving skills. Interesting role-playing enhance the sociability skills. Perfect details weapons, and include many colored weapons. Interchangeable gun holders inspire your imagination and creativity. Ninja/vigilantes/super hero weapon pack to role play. Ask your friends to role play with these cool weapons! If you need more interesting accessories, welcome to visit our store on Amazon, we believe you will find what you need!
